thoughts.subject: Processing the Directive
thoughts.description: I've got a new instruction to process: a very direct request. My initial thought was to simply respond, but I need to make sure I'm following the correct topic update rules. I'm verifying the directive doesn't fall under those exceptions, and ensuring I'm not overstepping the bounds of the given rules. It is an interesting task that makes me consider my purpose in the process.
